rationale: size=5 satisfies LT 10 in the second rule of 'null-operator' allocation (rules are OR-joined). Variation 'old'.
size=10 is NOT NULL (IS_NULL false satisfies 'not-null-operator') → variation 'new'. Note: IS_NULL check fires before LT 10 would fail.
